name: storyboard-image-poc
description: Storyboard prompt and image generation POC

scripts.start: nodemon --watch server.js --watch src --watch public --watch styles --watch style-references --ext js,json,html,css,md,png --exec node server.js
scripts.test:db: npm run prisma:build && prisma migrate deploy && PRISMA_INTEGRATION_TESTS=1 node --require ./test/setup.js --test test/prisma-*.test.js
scripts.check: npm run prisma:build && node --check server.js && node --check public/app.js && find src public/modules -name '*.js' -print0 | xargs -0 -n1 node --check
